attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT 
SMPRL.PURCHASE_REQUISITION_LINE_KEY as PURCHASE_REQUISITION_LINE_KEY,
NPR.BK_PURCHASE_REQUISITION_NUM as BK_PURCHASE_REQUISITION_NUM,
STEXPRL.LINE_NUM as BK_PR_LINE_NUMBER_INT, 
COALESCE(NFPT.BK_PROJECT_CODE, 'UNKNOW') as FUNCTIONAL_PROJECT_CD, 
 NIC.BK_ISO_CURRENCY_CODE AS   TRANSACTIONAL_CURRENCY_CD ,
STEXPRL.ITEM_DESCRIPTION as PR_LINE_ITEM_DESCR,
CASE WHEN STEXPRL.DV_CURRENCY_CODE ='USD' 
     THEN cast( (COALESCE(STEXPRL.CURRENCY_UNIT_PRICE,STEXPRL.UNIT_PRICE,0) * COALESCE(STEXPRL.QUANTITY,0)) as decimal(26,7) )
     ELSE cast ( (COALESCE(STEXPRL.CURRENCY_UNIT_PRICE,STEXPRL.UNIT_PRICE,0) * COALESCE(STEXPRL.QUANTITY,0) * NCCDR.PL_CONVERSION_RATE)  as decimal(26,7))
     end as DV_PR_LINE_USD_AMT, 
coalesce(CURRENCY_UNIT_PRICE ,UNIT_PRICE,0.0000000) * COALESCE(QUANTITY ,0) as PR_LINE_TRANSACTIONAL_AMT,
COALESCE(STEXPRL.UNIT_PRICE,0) * COALESCE(STEXPRL.QUANTITY,0) as PR_LINE_FUNCTIONAL_AMT,
CASE WHEN (STEXPRL.CATALOG_SOURCE IS NULL AND STEXPRL.CATALOG_TYPE IS NULL)
     THEN 'N' ELSE 'Y' 
     END as PR_LINE_CATALOG_FLG, 
COALESCE(RCWPKEY.CISCO_WORKER_PARTY_KEY, -999) as REQUESTOR_CISCO_WRKR_PARTY_KEY,
COALESCE(ICMCWPK.CISCO_WORKER_PARTY_KEY, -999) as ITM_CAT_MGR_CSCO_WRKR_PRTY_KEY,
case when (NAPVSP.AP_VENDOR_SITE_PARTY_KEY is NULL and  NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE='MFG') then -662
                 when (NAPVSP.AP_VENDOR_SITE_PARTY_KEY is NULL and  NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE='EMEA') then -661 
                 when (NAPVSP.AP_VENDOR_SITE_PARTY_KEY is NULL and  NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE='BV') then -660
                 when (NAPVSP.AP_VENDOR_SITE_PARTY_KEY is NULL and  NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE='QTC') then -659
                 when (NAPVSP.AP_VENDOR_SITE_PARTY_KEY is NULL and  NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE='CG') then -658
                                  else NAPVSP.AP_VENDOR_SITE_PARTY_KEY
end as AP_VENDOR_SITE_PARTY_KEY,
case when (NAPVP.AP_VENDOR_PARTY_KEY is NULL and  NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE='MFG') then -666
                 when (NAPVP.AP_VENDOR_PARTY_KEY is NULL and  NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE='EMEA') then -665 
                 when (NAPVP.AP_VENDOR_PARTY_KEY is NULL and  NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE='BV') then -664
                 when (NAPVP.AP_VENDOR_PARTY_KEY is NULL and  NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE='QTC') then -663
                 when (NAPVP.AP_VENDOR_PARTY_KEY is NULL and  NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE='CG') then -658
                 else NAPVP.AP_VENDOR_PARTY_KEY
end as AP_VENDOR_PARTY_KEY,    
'N' as SOURCE_DELETED_FLG, 
STEXPRL.ATTRIBUTE13 as RPTD_DLVR_CSCO_WRKR_PRTY_NAME,
COALESCE(NPIC.BK_PURCHASING_ITEM_CATEGORY_ID,'UNKOWN') as  BK_PURCHASING_ITEM_CATEGORY_ID,
STEXPRL.REQUISITION_LINE_ID as SK_PR_LINE_ID_INT, 
NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE as SS_CD,
COALESCE(STEXPRL.ATTRIBUTE10,'N')  AS PREPAYMENT_FLG
from 
                (select  
                                SCPRL.REQUISITION_LINE_ID
                                ,SCPRL.GLOBAL_NAME
                                ,SCPRL.REQUISITION_HEADER_ID
                                ,SCPRL.ORG_ID
                                ,SCPRL.CATEGORY_ID
                                ,SCPRL.TO_PERSON_ID
                                ,COALESCE(SCPRL.VENDOR_ID, -999) as VENDOR_ID_DD
                                ,COALESCE(SCPRL.VENDOR_SITE_ID,  -999) as VENDOR_SITE_ID_DD
                                ,COALESCE(SCPRL.CURRENCY_CODE,EOSC.CURRENCY_CODE) DV_CURRENCY_CODE
                                ,CAST(SCPRL.CREATION_DATE AS DATE) as CREATION_DATE_DD
                                ,SCPRL.ATTRIBUTE1
                                ,SCPRL.LINE_NUM
                                ,SCPRL.ITEM_DESCRIPTION
                                ,SCPRL.CURRENCY_UNIT_PRICE
                                ,SCPRL.UNIT_PRICE
                                ,SCPRL.QUANTITY
                                ,SCPRL.CATALOG_SOURCE
                                ,SCPRL.CATALOG_TYPE
                                ,SCPRL.ATTRIBUTE13
								,SCPRL.ATTRIBUTE10
                from $$STGDB.ST_CG1_PO_REQUISITION_LINES SCPRL,
                     $$ETLVWDB.EL_PO_REQUISITION_HEADER EPRH,
                     $$ETLVWDB.EV_ORG_SOB_CURRENCY  EOSC      
                                where SCPRL.REQUISITION_HEADER_ID = EPRH.REQUISITION_HEADER_ID
                                                and SCPRL.GLOBAL_NAME=EPRH.GLOBAL_NAME
                                                 AND EOSC.ORG_ID=SCPRL.ORG_ID 
             AND EOSC.GLOBAL_NAME=SCPRL.GLOBAL_NAME
                                                
                union all
                select 
                                ECPRL.REQUISITION_LINE_ID
                                ,ECPRL.GLOBAL_NAME
                                ,ECPRL.REQUISITION_HEADER_ID
                                ,ECPRL.ORG_ID
                                ,ECPRL.CATEGORY_ID
                                ,ECPRL.TO_PERSON_ID
                                ,ECPRL.VENDOR_ID as VENDOR_ID_DD
                                ,ECPRL.VENDOR_SITE_ID as VENDOR_SITE_ID_DD
                                ,COALESCE(ECPRL.CURRENCY_CODE,EOSC.CURRENCY_CODE) DV_CURRENCY_CODE
                                ,CAST (ECPRL.CREATION_DATE AS DATE) as CREATION_DATE_DD
                                ,ECPRL.ATTRIBUTE1
                                ,ECPRL.LINE_NUM
                                ,ECPRL.ITEM_DESCRIPTION
                                ,ECPRL.CURRENCY_UNIT_PRICE
                                ,ECPRL.UNIT_PRICE
                                ,ECPRL.QUANTITY
                                ,ECPRL.CATALOG_SOURCE
                                ,ECPRL.CATALOG_TYPE
                                ,ECPRL.ATTRIBUTE13
								,ECPRL.ATTRIBUTE10
                from $$EXCEPDB.EX_CG1_PO_REQUISITION_LINES ECPRL,
                     $$ETLVWDB.EV_ORG_SOB_CURRENCY  EOSC    
                 WHERE  EOSC.ORG_ID=ECPRL.ORG_ID 
             AND EOSC.GLOBAL_NAME=ECPRL.GLOBAL_NAME
                )STEXPRL
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC 
                ON (NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME = STEXPRL.GLOBAL_NAME )
INNER JOIN $$TRANSLATIONDB.SM_PURCHASE_REQUISITION_LINE SMPRL
                ON (SMPRL.SK_PR_LINE_ID_INT=STEXPRL.REQUISITION_LINE_ID
                    AND SMPRL.SS_CD= NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE)
INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_PURCHASE_REQUISITION NPR
                ON (NPR.SK_PURCHASE_REQUISITION_ID_INT=STEXPRL.REQUISITION_HEADER_ID
                    AND NPR.SS_CD=NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE)                         
INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_CURRENCY_CONV_DAILY_RATE NCCDR 
                ON (NCCDR.BK_FROM_CURRENCY_CODE=STEXPRL.DV_CURRENCY_CODE 
            AND NCCDR.BK_CONVERSION_DATE=STEXPRL.CREATION_DATE_DD
            AND NCCDR.BK_TO_CURRENCY_CODE ='USD')                                      
INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_ISO_CURRENCY_TV NIC
                ON (NIC.BK_ISO_CURRENCY_CODE=STEXPRL.DV_CURRENCY_CODE
                                AND NIC.END_TV_DATE='3500-01-01')                   
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_ACCTS_PYBL_VNDR_PRTY NAPVP
                ON (NAPVP.SK_VENDOR_ID_INT = STEXPRL.VENDOR_ID_DD
                    AND NAPVP.BK_SS_CD=NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE) 
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_ACCTS_PYBL_VNDR_SITE_PRTY NAPVSP
                ON (NAPVSP.SK_VENDOR_SITE_ID_INT = STEXPRL.VENDOR_SITE_ID_DD
                    AND NAPVSP.SS_CODE=NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE)   
LEFT OUTER JOIN (SELECT DISTINCT BK_PROJECT_CODE FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_FINANCIAL_PROJECT) NFPT
                ON (NFPT.BK_PROJECT_CODE= STEXPRL.ATTRIBUTE1)
LEFT OUTER JOIN (
                SELECT EPOCR.ATTRIBUTE2,EPOCR.ATTRIBUTE1, EPOCR.GLOBAL_NAME,EPOCG.ORG_ID,NCWP.CISCO_WORKER_PARTY_KEY, NCWP.BK_EMPLOYEE_ID 
                FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_PO_CONTROL_GROUPS_ALL EPOCG,
                  ( 
                     select * from $$ETLVWDB.EL_PO_CONTROL_RULES  EPOCR1
                       where  EPOCR1.ATTRIBUTE_CATEGORY = 'CFI_iProc_Category_Threshold' 
                         AND EPOCR1.OBJECT_CODE = 'ITEM_CATEGORY_RANGE' 
                         AND EPOCR1.RULE_TYPE_CODE = 'INCLUDE'
                   QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY CONTROL_GROUP_ID ,ATTRIBUTE1,GLOBAL_NAME  ORDER BY GES_UPDATE_DATE DESC) =1 )EPOCR ,
                   $$COMREFVWDB.N_CISCO_WORKER_PARTY NCWP
                WHERE EPOCG.CONTROL_GROUP_ID = EPOCR.CONTROL_GROUP_ID
                    AND EPOCG.GLOBAL_NAME = EPOCR.GLOBAL_NAME
                    AND NCWP.BK_EMPLOYEE_ID = EPOCR.ATTRIBUTE2
                    
                     and EPOCG.CONTROL_GROUP_NAME LIKE 'CFI_IPROC_CATEGORY_MGR%'  
                     AND EPOCG.ENABLED_FLAG = 'Y'
                GROUP BY EPOCR.ATTRIBUTE2,EPOCR.ATTRIBUTE1, EPOCR.GLOBAL_NAME, 
                    EPOCG.ORG_ID, NCWP.CISCO_WORKER_PARTY_KEY, NCWP.BK_EMPLOYEE_ID
    )ICMCWPK
    ON (STEXPRL.ORG_ID  = ICMCWPK.ORG_ID
        AND STEXPRL.CATEGORY_ID = ICMCWPK.ATTRIBUTE1
        AND STEXPRL.GLOBAL_NAME = ICMCWPK.GLOBAL_NAME)
LEFT OUTER JOIN (SELECT EEPAPF.PERSON_ID,EEPAPF.GLOBAL_NAME,NCWP.CISCO_WORKER_PARTY_KEY 
                                 FROM $$ETLVWDB.EV_EL_PER_ALL_PEOPLE_F EEPAPF,
                                      $$COMREFVWDB.N_CISCO_WORKER_PARTY NCWP
                                WHERE NCWP.BK_EMPLOYEE_ID =EEPAPF.EMPLOYEE_NUMBER 
                                ) RCWPKEY
                ON (RCWPKEY.PERSON_ID=STEXPRL.TO_PERSON_ID 
                    AND RCWPKEY.GLOBAL_NAME=STEXPRL.GLOBAL_NAME)
LEFT OUTER JOIN (SELECT EMCBT.CATEGORY_ID,EMCBT.GLOBAL_NAME,NPICI.BK_PURCHASING_ITEM_CATEGORY_ID
                                from $$ETLVWDB.EL_MTL_CATEGORIES_B_TL EMCBT,
                                     $$FINLGLVWDB.N_PURCHASING_ITEM_CATEGORY NPICI
                                where EMCBT.SEGMENT1=NPICI.BK_PURCHASING_ITEM_CATEGORY_ID
                                AND EMCBT.LANGUAGE_CODE='US')NPIC
                ON (NPIC.CATEGORY_ID= STEXPRL.CATEGORY_ID
                    AND NPIC.GLOBAL_NAME = STEXPRL.GLOBAL_NAME )

SELECT   RANK () OVER (ORDER BY SMPRLA.REQUISITION_LINE_ID,SMPRLA.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE) + MAX_VAL PURCHASE_REQUISITION_LINE_KEY,
      		 SMPRLA.REQUISITION_LINE_ID, SMPRLA.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE
  FROM (SELECT SMPORLA.REQUISITION_LINE_ID, NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE
          FROM $$STGDB.ST_MF_PO_REQ_LINES_ALL SMPORLA,
		      $$ETLVWDB.EL_PO_REQUISITION_HEADER EPRH,
              $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
         WHERE NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME = SMPORLA.GLOBAL_NAME
		      AND SMPORLA.REQUISITION_HEADER_ID = EPRH.REQUISITION_HEADER_ID
			  AND SMPORLA.GLOBAL_NAME=EPRH.GLOBAL_NAME
			  /*AND EPRH.APPS_SOURCE_CODE='POR' gowsubra: Commented as part of Q2Fy17*/
	UNION ALL
			SELECT SCPRL.REQUISITION_LINE_ID, NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE
          FROM $$STGDB.ST_CG1_PO_REQUISITION_LINES SCPRL,
		      $$ETLVWDB.EL_PO_REQUISITION_HEADER EPRH,
              $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
         WHERE NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME = SCPRL.GLOBAL_NAME
		      AND SCPRL.REQUISITION_HEADER_ID = EPRH.REQUISITION_HEADER_ID
			  AND SCPRL.GLOBAL_NAME=EPRH.GLOBAL_NAME
        	  ) SMPRLA,
       (SELECT COALESCE (MAX (PURCHASE_REQUISITION_LINE_KEY), 0) MAX_VAL
          FROM $$TRANSLATIONDB.SM_PURCHASE_REQUISITION_LINE) SMPRL
 WHERE NOT EXISTS (
          SELECT 1
            FROM $$TRANSLATIONDB.SM_PURCHASE_REQUISITION_LINE SPRL
           WHERE SMPRLA.REQUISITION_LINE_ID = SPRL.SK_PR_LINE_ID_INT
             AND SMPRLA.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE = SPRL.SS_CD)

SELECT 
 STELPRL.BATCH_ID                      
,STELPRL.ATTRIBUTE1                    
,STELPRL.ATTRIBUTE13                   
,STELPRL.CATALOG_SOURCE                
,COALESCE (STELPRL.CATALOG_TYPE, 'UNKNOWN') CATALOG_TYPE                  
,STELPRL.CATEGORY_ID                   
,STELPRL.CREATION_DATE                
,STELPRL.CURRENCY_CODE                 
,STELPRL.CURRENCY_UNIT_PRICE           
,STELPRL.ITEM_DESCRIPTION              
,STELPRL.LINE_NUM                      
,STELPRL.ORG_ID                        
,STELPRL.QUANTITY                      
,STELPRL.REQUISITION_HEADER_ID         
,STELPRL.REQUISITION_LINE_ID           
,STELPRL.TO_PERSON_ID                  
,STELPRL.UNIT_PRICE                    
,STELPRL.VENDOR_ID_DD                     
,STELPRL.VENDOR_SITE_ID_DD                
,STELPRL.GES_UPDATE_DATE               
,STELPRL.GLOBAL_NAME                   
,STELPRL.CREATE_DATETIME               
,STELPRL.ACTION_CODE
,'RI' EXCEPTION_TYPE
,COALESCE (STELPRL.ITEM_SOURCE_ID   , -999) ITEM_SOURCE_ID
,STELPRL.ATTRIBUTE10 
FROM             
	(
	SELECT 
		 SMPRLA.BATCH_ID                      
		,SMPRLA.ATTRIBUTE1                    
		,SMPRLA.ATTRIBUTE13  
		,SMPRLA.ATTRIBUTE10
		,SMPRLA.CATALOG_SOURCE                
		,SMPRLA.CATALOG_TYPE                  
		,SMPRLA.CATEGORY_ID                   
		,CAST(SMPRLA.CREATION_DATE AS DATE) AS CREATION_DATE_DD   
                             ,SMPRLA.CREATION_DATE              
		,SMPRLA.CURRENCY_CODE                 
		,SMPRLA.CURRENCY_UNIT_PRICE           
		,SMPRLA.ITEM_DESCRIPTION              
		,SMPRLA.LINE_NUM                      
		,SMPRLA.ORG_ID                        
		,SMPRLA.QUANTITY                      
		,SMPRLA.REQUISITION_HEADER_ID         
		,SMPRLA.REQUISITION_LINE_ID           
		,SMPRLA.TO_PERSON_ID                  
		,SMPRLA.UNIT_PRICE                    
		,COALESCE(SMPRLA.VENDOR_ID, -999) AS VENDOR_ID_DD                     
		,COALESCE(SMPRLA.VENDOR_SITE_ID, -999) AS VENDOR_SITE_ID_DD              
		,SMPRLA.GES_UPDATE_DATE               
		,SMPRLA.GLOBAL_NAME                   
		,SMPRLA.CREATE_DATETIME               
		,SMPRLA.ACTION_CODE  
		,SMPRLA.ITEM_SOURCE_ID
		FROM $$STGDB.ST_MF_PO_REQ_LINES_ALL SMPRLA,
		     $$ETLVWDB.EL_PO_REQUISITION_HEADER EPRH
		WHERE SMPRLA.REQUISITION_HEADER_ID = EPRH.REQUISITION_HEADER_ID
			AND SMPRLA.GLOBAL_NAME=EPRH.GLOBAL_NAME
	)STELPRL
WHERE
(
 NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_PURCHASE_REQUISITION NPR,$$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC 
	              WHERE NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME = STELPRL.GLOBAL_NAME 
			    AND NPR.SK_PURCHASE_REQUISITION_ID_INT=STELPRL.REQUISITION_HEADER_ID
	    		    AND NPR.SS_CD=NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE)   
OR NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_ISO_CURRENCY_TV NIC	,
                             $$ETLVWDB.EV_ORG_SOB_CURRENCY EOSC
 			WHERE EOSC.ORG_ID=STELPRL.ORG_ID 
				  AND EOSC.GLOBAL_NAME=STELPRL.GLOBAL_NAME 
				  AND NIC.BK_ISO_CURRENCY_CODE=COALESCE(STELPRL.CURRENCY_CODE,EOSC.CURRENCY_CODE)  
			      AND END_TV_DATE='3500-01-01')  
OR NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$ETLVWDB.EV_ORG_SOB_CURRENCY EOSC
                WHERE EOSC.ORG_ID=STELPRL.ORG_ID 
				  AND EOSC.GLOBAL_NAME=STELPRL.GLOBAL_NAME)
OR NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_CURRENCY_CONV_DAILY_RATE NCCDR ,
                             $$ETLVWDB.EV_ORG_SOB_CURRENCY EOSC
 			WHERE EOSC.ORG_ID=STELPRL.ORG_ID 
				  AND EOSC.GLOBAL_NAME=STELPRL.GLOBAL_NAME 
				  AND NCCDR.BK_FROM_CURRENCY_CODE=COALESCE(STELPRL.CURRENCY_CODE,EOSC.CURRENCY_CODE) 
           		      AND NCCDR.BK_CONVERSION_DATE=STELPRL.CREATION_DATE_DD
            		      AND NCCDR.BK_TO_CURRENCY_CODE ='USD')   
OR NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$COMREFVWDB.N_ACCTS_PYBL_VNDR_PRTY NAPVP,$$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC 
	                WHERE NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME = STELPRL.GLOBAL_NAME 
	                     AND  NAPVP.SK_VENDOR_ID_INT = STELPRL.VENDOR_ID_DD
	    		     AND NAPVP.BK_SS_CD=NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE) 
OR NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$COMREFVWDB.N_ACCTS_PYBL_VNDR_SITE_PRTY NAPVSP,$$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC 
	                WHERE NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME = STELPRL.GLOBAL_NAME 
	                     AND NAPVSP.SK_VENDOR_SITE_ID_INT = STELPRL.VENDOR_SITE_ID_DD
	     		      AND NAPVSP.SS_CODE=NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE)   
)

SELECT 
SMPRL.PURCHASE_REQUISITION_LINE_KEY as PURCHASE_REQUISITION_LINE_KEY,
NPR.BK_PURCHASE_REQUISITION_NUM as BK_PURCHASE_REQUISITION_NUM,
STEXPRL.LINE_NUM as BK_PR_LINE_NUMBER_INT, 
COALESCE(NFPT.BK_PROJECT_CODE, 'UNKNOW') as FUNCTIONAL_PROJECT_CD, 
 NIC.BK_ISO_CURRENCY_CODE AS   TRANSACTIONAL_CURRENCY_CD ,
STEXPRL.ITEM_DESCRIPTION as PR_LINE_ITEM_DESCR,
CASE WHEN STEXPRL.DV_CURRENCY_CODE ='USD' 
     THEN cast( (COALESCE(STEXPRL.CURRENCY_UNIT_PRICE,STEXPRL.UNIT_PRICE,0) * COALESCE(STEXPRL.QUANTITY,0)) as decimal(26,7) )
     ELSE cast ( (COALESCE(STEXPRL.CURRENCY_UNIT_PRICE,STEXPRL.UNIT_PRICE,0) * COALESCE(STEXPRL.QUANTITY,0) * NCCDR.PL_CONVERSION_RATE)  as decimal(26,7))
     end as DV_PR_LINE_USD_AMT, 
coalesce(CURRENCY_UNIT_PRICE ,UNIT_PRICE,0.0000000) * COALESCE(QUANTITY ,0) as PR_LINE_TRANSACTIONAL_AMT,
COALESCE(STEXPRL.UNIT_PRICE,0) * COALESCE(STEXPRL.QUANTITY,0) as PR_LINE_FUNCTIONAL_AMT,
CASE WHEN (STEXPRL.CATALOG_SOURCE IS NULL AND STEXPRL.CATALOG_TYPE IS NULL)
     THEN 'N' ELSE 'Y' 
     END as PR_LINE_CATALOG_FLG, 
COALESCE(RCWPKEY.CISCO_WORKER_PARTY_KEY, -999) as REQUESTOR_CISCO_WRKR_PARTY_KEY,
COALESCE(ICMCWPK.CISCO_WORKER_PARTY_KEY, -999) as ITM_CAT_MGR_CSCO_WRKR_PRTY_KEY,
case when (NAPVSP.AP_VENDOR_SITE_PARTY_KEY is NULL and  NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE='MFG') then -662
                 when (NAPVSP.AP_VENDOR_SITE_PARTY_KEY is NULL and  NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE='EMEA') then -661 
                 when (NAPVSP.AP_VENDOR_SITE_PARTY_KEY is NULL and  NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE='BV') then -660
                 when (NAPVSP.AP_VENDOR_SITE_PARTY_KEY is NULL and  NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE='QTC') then -659
                 else NAPVSP.AP_VENDOR_SITE_PARTY_KEY
end as AP_VENDOR_SITE_PARTY_KEY,
case when (NAPVP.AP_VENDOR_PARTY_KEY is NULL and  NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE='MFG') then -666
                 when (NAPVP.AP_VENDOR_PARTY_KEY is NULL and  NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE='EMEA') then -665 
                 when (NAPVP.AP_VENDOR_PARTY_KEY is NULL and  NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE='BV') then -664
                 when (NAPVP.AP_VENDOR_PARTY_KEY is NULL and  NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE='QTC') then -663
                 else NAPVP.AP_VENDOR_PARTY_KEY
end as AP_VENDOR_PARTY_KEY,    
'N' as SOURCE_DELETED_FLG, 
STEXPRL.ATTRIBUTE13 as RPTD_DLVR_CSCO_WRKR_PRTY_NAME,
COALESCE(NPIC.BK_PURCHASING_ITEM_CATEGORY_ID,'UNKOWN') as  BK_PURCHASING_ITEM_CATEGORY_ID,
STEXPRL.REQUISITION_LINE_ID as SK_PR_LINE_ID_INT, 
NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE as SS_CD,
COALESCE (STEXPRL.CATALOG_TYPE ,'UNKNOWN') AS CATALOG_TYPE_CD,
COALESCE (STEXPRL.ITEM_SOURCE_ID, -999) AS ITEM_CATALOG_SOURCE_ID_INT,
COALESCE (STEXPRL.ATTRIBUTE10,'N') AS PREPAYMENT_FLG
from 
                (select  
                                SMPRLA.REQUISITION_LINE_ID
                                ,SMPRLA.GLOBAL_NAME
                                ,SMPRLA.REQUISITION_HEADER_ID
                                ,SMPRLA.ORG_ID
                                ,SMPRLA.CATEGORY_ID
                                ,SMPRLA.TO_PERSON_ID
                                ,COALESCE(SMPRLA.VENDOR_ID, -999) as VENDOR_ID_DD
                                ,COALESCE(SMPRLA.VENDOR_SITE_ID,  -999) as VENDOR_SITE_ID_DD
                                ,COALESCE(SMPRLA.CURRENCY_CODE,EOSC.CURRENCY_CODE) DV_CURRENCY_CODE
                                ,CAST(SMPRLA.CREATION_DATE AS DATE) as CREATION_DATE_DD
                                ,SMPRLA.ATTRIBUTE1
                                ,SMPRLA.LINE_NUM
                                ,SMPRLA.ITEM_DESCRIPTION
                                ,SMPRLA.CURRENCY_UNIT_PRICE
                                ,SMPRLA.UNIT_PRICE
                                ,SMPRLA.QUANTITY
                                ,SMPRLA.CATALOG_SOURCE
                                ,SMPRLA.CATALOG_TYPE
                                ,SMPRLA.ATTRIBUTE13
								,SMPRLA.ATTRIBUTE10
								,SMPRLA.ITEM_SOURCE_ID
                from $$STGDB.ST_MF_PO_REQ_LINES_ALL SMPRLA,
                     $$ETLVWDB.EL_PO_REQUISITION_HEADER EPRH,
                     $$ETLVWDB.EV_ORG_SOB_CURRENCY  EOSC      
                                where SMPRLA.REQUISITION_HEADER_ID = EPRH.REQUISITION_HEADER_ID
                                                and SMPRLA.GLOBAL_NAME=EPRH.GLOBAL_NAME
                                                 AND EOSC.ORG_ID=SMPRLA.ORG_ID 
             AND EOSC.GLOBAL_NAME=SMPRLA.GLOBAL_NAME
                                                
                union all
                select 
                                EPRL.REQUISITION_LINE_ID
                                ,EPRL.GLOBAL_NAME
                                ,EPRL.REQUISITION_HEADER_ID
                                ,EPRL.ORG_ID
                                ,EPRL.CATEGORY_ID
                                ,EPRL.TO_PERSON_ID
                                ,EPRL.VENDOR_ID as VENDOR_ID_DD
                                ,EPRL.VENDOR_SITE_ID as VENDOR_SITE_ID_DD
                                ,COALESCE(EPRL.CURRENCY_CODE,EOSC.CURRENCY_CODE) DV_CURRENCY_CODE
                                ,CAST (EPRL.CREATION_DATE AS DATE) as CREATION_DATE_DD
                                ,EPRL.ATTRIBUTE1
                                ,EPRL.LINE_NUM
                                ,EPRL.ITEM_DESCRIPTION
                                ,EPRL.CURRENCY_UNIT_PRICE
                                ,EPRL.UNIT_PRICE
                                ,EPRL.QUANTITY
                                ,EPRL.CATALOG_SOURCE
                                ,EPRL.CATALOG_TYPE
                                ,EPRL.ATTRIBUTE13
								,EPRL.ATTRIBUTE10
								,EPRL.ITEM_SOURCE_ID
                from $$EXCEPDB.EX_PO_REQUISITION_LINES EPRL,
                     $$ETLVWDB.EV_ORG_SOB_CURRENCY  EOSC    
                 WHERE  EOSC.ORG_ID=EPRL.ORG_ID 
             AND EOSC.GLOBAL_NAME=EPRL.GLOBAL_NAME
                )STEXPRL
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC 
                ON (NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME = STEXPRL.GLOBAL_NAME )
INNER JOIN $$TRANSLATIONDB.SM_PURCHASE_REQUISITION_LINE SMPRL
                ON (SMPRL.SK_PR_LINE_ID_INT=STEXPRL.REQUISITION_LINE_ID
                    AND SMPRL.SS_CD= NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE)
INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_PURCHASE_REQUISITION NPR
                ON (NPR.SK_PURCHASE_REQUISITION_ID_INT=STEXPRL.REQUISITION_HEADER_ID
                    AND NPR.SS_CD=NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE)                         
INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_CURRENCY_CONV_DAILY_RATE NCCDR 
                ON (NCCDR.BK_FROM_CURRENCY_CODE=STEXPRL.DV_CURRENCY_CODE 
            AND NCCDR.BK_CONVERSION_DATE=STEXPRL.CREATION_DATE_DD
            AND NCCDR.BK_TO_CURRENCY_CODE ='USD')                                      
INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_ISO_CURRENCY_TV NIC
                ON (NIC.BK_ISO_CURRENCY_CODE=STEXPRL.DV_CURRENCY_CODE
                                AND NIC.END_TV_DATE='3500-01-01')                   
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_ACCTS_PYBL_VNDR_PRTY NAPVP
                ON (NAPVP.SK_VENDOR_ID_INT = STEXPRL.VENDOR_ID_DD
                    AND NAPVP.BK_SS_CD=NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE) 
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_ACCTS_PYBL_VNDR_SITE_PRTY NAPVSP
                ON (NAPVSP.SK_VENDOR_SITE_ID_INT = STEXPRL.VENDOR_SITE_ID_DD
                    AND NAPVSP.SS_CODE=NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE)   
LEFT OUTER JOIN (SELECT DISTINCT BK_PROJECT_CODE FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_FINANCIAL_PROJECT) NFPT
                ON (NFPT.BK_PROJECT_CODE= STEXPRL.ATTRIBUTE1)
LEFT OUTER JOIN (
                SELECT EPOCR.ATTRIBUTE2,EPOCR.ATTRIBUTE1, EPOCR.GLOBAL_NAME,EPOCG.ORG_ID,NCWP.CISCO_WORKER_PARTY_KEY, NCWP.BK_EMPLOYEE_ID 
                FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_PO_CONTROL_GROUPS_ALL EPOCG,
                  ( 
                     select * from $$ETLVWDB.EL_PO_CONTROL_RULES  EPOCR1
                       where  EPOCR1.ATTRIBUTE_CATEGORY = 'CFI_iProc_Category_Threshold' 
                         AND EPOCR1.OBJECT_CODE = 'ITEM_CATEGORY_RANGE' 
                         AND EPOCR1.RULE_TYPE_CODE = 'INCLUDE'
                   QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY CONTROL_GROUP_ID ,ATTRIBUTE1,GLOBAL_NAME  ORDER BY GES_UPDATE_DATE DESC) =1 )EPOCR ,
                   $$COMREFVWDB.N_CISCO_WORKER_PARTY NCWP
                WHERE EPOCG.CONTROL_GROUP_ID = EPOCR.CONTROL_GROUP_ID
                    AND EPOCG.GLOBAL_NAME = EPOCR.GLOBAL_NAME
                    AND NCWP.BK_EMPLOYEE_ID = EPOCR.ATTRIBUTE2
                    
                     and EPOCG.CONTROL_GROUP_NAME LIKE 'CFI_IPROC_CATEGORY_MGR%'  
                     AND EPOCG.ENABLED_FLAG = 'Y'
                GROUP BY EPOCR.ATTRIBUTE2,EPOCR.ATTRIBUTE1, EPOCR.GLOBAL_NAME, 
                    EPOCG.ORG_ID, NCWP.CISCO_WORKER_PARTY_KEY, NCWP.BK_EMPLOYEE_ID
    )ICMCWPK
    ON (STEXPRL.ORG_ID  = ICMCWPK.ORG_ID
        AND STEXPRL.CATEGORY_ID = ICMCWPK.ATTRIBUTE1
        AND STEXPRL.GLOBAL_NAME = ICMCWPK.GLOBAL_NAME)
LEFT OUTER JOIN (SELECT EEPAPF.PERSON_ID,EEPAPF.GLOBAL_NAME,NCWP.CISCO_WORKER_PARTY_KEY 
                                 FROM $$ETLVWDB.EV_EL_PER_ALL_PEOPLE_F EEPAPF,
                                      $$COMREFVWDB.N_CISCO_WORKER_PARTY NCWP
                                WHERE NCWP.BK_EMPLOYEE_ID =EEPAPF.EMPLOYEE_NUMBER 
                                ) RCWPKEY
                ON (RCWPKEY.PERSON_ID=STEXPRL.TO_PERSON_ID 
                    AND RCWPKEY.GLOBAL_NAME=STEXPRL.GLOBAL_NAME)
LEFT OUTER JOIN (SELECT EMCBT.CATEGORY_ID,EMCBT.GLOBAL_NAME,NPICI.BK_PURCHASING_ITEM_CATEGORY_ID
                                from $$ETLVWDB.EL_MTL_CATEGORIES_B_TL EMCBT,
                                     $$FINLGLVWDB.N_PURCHASING_ITEM_CATEGORY NPICI
                                where EMCBT.SEGMENT1=NPICI.BK_PURCHASING_ITEM_CATEGORY_ID
                                 AND EMCBT.LANGUAGE_CODE='US' )NPIC
                ON (NPIC.CATEGORY_ID= STEXPRL.CATEGORY_ID
                    AND NPIC.GLOBAL_NAME = STEXPRL.GLOBAL_NAME )

SELECT STELPRL.REQUISITION_LINE_ID, STELPRL.REQUISITION_HEADER_ID, STELPRL.LINE_NUM, STELPRL.LINE_TYPE_ID, STELPRL.CATEGORY_ID, STELPRL.ITEM_DESCRIPTION, STELPRL.DELIVER_TO_LOCATION_ID, STELPRL.TO_PERSON_ID, STELPRL.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, STELPRL.LAST_UPDATED_BY, STELPRL.SOURCE_TYPE_CODE, STELPRL.ORDER_TYPE_LOOKUP_CODE, STELPRL.PURCHASE_BASIS, STELPRL.MATCHING_BASIS, STELPRL.INVENTORY_SOURCE_CONTEXT, STELPRL.VENDOR_SOURCE_CONTEXT, STELPRL.ATTRIBUTE1, STELPRL.ATTRIBUTE2, STELPRL.ATTRIBUTE3, STELPRL.ATTRIBUTE4, STELPRL.ATTRIBUTE5, STELPRL.ATTRIBUTE6, STELPRL.ATTRIBUTE7, STELPRL.ATTRIBUTE8, STELPRL.ATTRIBUTE9, STELPRL.ATTRIBUTE10, STELPRL.ATTRIBUTE11, STELPRL.ATTRIBUTE12, STELPRL.ATTRIBUTE13, STELPRL.ATTRIBUTE14, STELPRL.ATTRIBUTE15, STELPRL.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE2, STELPRL.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE3, STELPRL.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE4, STELPRL.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE5, STELPRL.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE6, STELPRL.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE7, STELPRL.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE8, STELPRL.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE9, STELPRL.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE10, STELPRL.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE11, STELPRL.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE12, STELPRL.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE13, STELPRL.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE14, STELPRL.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE15, STELPRL.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE16, STELPRL.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE17, STELPRL.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE18, STELPRL.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE19, STELPRL.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE20, STELPRL.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE_CATEGORY, STELPRL.KANBAN_CARD_ID, STELPRL.REQUESTER_PHONE, STELPRL.UNSPSC_CODE, STELPRL.OTHER_CATEGORY_CODE, STELPRL.SUPPLIER_DUNS, STELPRL.TAX_STATUS_INDICATOR, STELPRL.PCARD_FLAG, STELPRL.NEW_SUPPLIER_FLAG, STELPRL.AUTO_RECEIVE_FLAG, STELPRL.TAX_USER_OVERRIDE_FLAG, STELPRL.TAX_CODE_ID, STELPRL.NOTE_TO_VENDOR, STELPRL.OKE_CONTRACT_VERSION_ID, STELPRL.OKE_CONTRACT_HEADER_ID, STELPRL.ITEM_SOURCE_ID, STELPRL.SUPPLIER_REF_NUMBER, STELPRL.SECONDARY_UNIT_OF_MEASURE, STELPRL.SECONDARY_QUANTITY, STELPRL.PREFERRED_GRADE, STELPRL.SECONDARY_QUANTITY_RECEIVED, STELPRL.SECONDARY_QUANTITY_CANCELLED, STELPRL.VMI_FLAG, STELPRL.AUCTION_HEADER_ID, STELPRL.AUCTION_DISPLAY_NUMBER, STELPRL.AUCTION_LINE_NUMBER, STELPRL.REQS_IN_POOL_FLAG, STELPRL.BID_NUMBER, STELPRL.BID_LINE_NUMBER, STELPRL.JOB_LONG_DESCRIPTION, STELPRL.CONTRACTOR_STATUS, STELPRL.CONTACT_INFORMATION, STELPRL.SUGGESTED_SUPPLIER_FLAG, STELPRL.CANDIDATE_SCREENING_REQD_FLAG, STELPRL.CANDIDATE_FIRST_NAME, STELPRL.CANDIDATE_LAST_NAME, STELPRL.ASSIGNMENT_END_DATE, STELPRL.OVERTIME_ALLOWED_FLAG, STELPRL.CONTRACTOR_REQUISITION_FLAG, STELPRL.DROP_SHIP_FLAG, STELPRL.ASSIGNMENT_START_DATE, STELPRL.NEGOTIATED_BY_PREPARER_FLAG, STELPRL.SHIP_METHOD, STELPRL.ESTIMATED_PICKUP_DATE, STELPRL.SUPPLIER_NOTIFIED_FOR_CANCEL, STELPRL.BASE_UNIT_PRICE, STELPRL.AT_SOURCING_FLAG, STELPRL.TAX_ATTRIBUTE_UPDATE_CODE, STELPRL.TAX_NAME, STELPRL.TRANSFERRED_TO_OE_FLAG, STELPRL.CONFORMED_LINE_ID, STELPRL.AMENDMENT_TYPE, STELPRL.AMENDMENT_STATUS, STELPRL.LINE_NUM_DISPLAY, STELPRL.GROUP_LINE_ID, STELPRL.CLM_INFO_FLAG, STELPRL.CLM_OPTION_INDICATOR, STELPRL.CLM_BASE_LINE_NUM, STELPRL.CLM_OPTION_NUM, STELPRL.CLM_OPTION_FROM_DATE, STELPRL.CLM_OPTION_TO_DATE, STELPRL.CLM_FUNDED_FLAG, STELPRL.UDA_TEMPLATE_ID, STELPRL.CONTRACT_TYPE, STELPRL.COST_CONSTRAINT, STELPRL.AMENDMENT_RESPONSE_REASON, STELPRL.CLM_PERIOD_PERF_START_DATE, STELPRL.CLM_PERIOD_PERF_END_DATE, STELPRL.CLM_EXTENDED_ITEM_DESCRIPTION, STELPRL.CLM_OPTION_EXERCISED, STELPRL.GES_UPDATE_DATE, STELPRL.GLOBAL_NAME, STELPRL.BATCH_ID, STELPRL.CREATE_DATETIME, STELPRL.ACTION_CODE ,'RI' EXCEPTION_TYPE   
FROM
(
SELECT SCPRL.REQUISITION_LINE_ID, SCPRL.REQUISITION_HEADER_ID, SCPRL.LINE_NUM, SCPRL.LINE_TYPE_ID, SCPRL.CATEGORY_ID, SCPRL.ITEM_DESCRIPTION, SCPRL.DELIVER_TO_LOCATION_ID, SCPRL.TO_PERSON_ID, SCPRL.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, SCPRL.LAST_UPDATED_BY, SCPRL.SOURCE_TYPE_CODE, SCPRL.ORDER_TYPE_LOOKUP_CODE, SCPRL.PURCHASE_BASIS, SCPRL.MATCHING_BASIS, SCPRL.UNIT_MEAS_LOOKUP_CODE, SCPRL.UNIT_PRICE, SCPRL.QUANTITY, SCPRL.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN, CAST(SCPRL.CREATION_DATE AS DATE) AS CREATION_DATE_DD, SCPRL.CREATION_DATE, SCPRL.CREATED_BY, SCPRL.ITEM_ID, SCPRL.ITEM_REVISION, SCPRL.QUANTITY_DELIVERED, SCPRL.SUGGESTED_BUYER_ID, SCPRL.ENCUMBERED_FLAG, SCPRL.RFQ_REQUIRED_FLAG, SCPRL.NEED_BY_DATE, SCPRL.LINE_LOCATION_ID, SCPRL.MODIFIED_BY_AGENT_FLAG, SCPRL.PARENT_REQ_LINE_ID, SCPRL.JUSTIFICATION, SCPRL.NOTE_TO_AGENT, SCPRL.NOTE_TO_RECEIVER, SCPRL.PURCHASING_AGENT_ID, SCPRL.DOCUMENT_TYPE_CODE, SCPRL.BLANKET_PO_HEADER_ID, SCPRL.BLANKET_PO_LINE_NUM, SCPRL.CURRENCY_CODE, SCPRL.RATE_TYPE, SCPRL.RATE_DATE, SCPRL.RATE, SCPRL.CURRENCY_UNIT_PRICE, SCPRL.SUGGESTED_VENDOR_NAME, SCPRL.SUGGESTED_VENDOR_LOCATION, SCPRL.SUGGESTED_VENDOR_CONTACT, SCPRL.SUGGESTED_VENDOR_PHONE, SCPRL.SUGGESTED_VENDOR_PRODUCT_CODE, SCPRL.UN_NUMBER_ID, SCPRL.HAZARD_CLASS_ID, SCPRL.MUST_USE_SUGG_VENDOR_FLAG, SCPRL.REFERENCE_NUM, SCPRL.ON_RFQ_FLAG, SCPRL.URGENT_FLAG, SCPRL.CANCEL_FLAG, SCPRL.SOURCE_ORGANIZATION_ID, SCPRL.SOURCE_SUBINVENTORY, SCPRL.DESTINATION_TYPE_CODE, SCPRL.DESTINATION_ORGANIZATION_ID, SCPRL.DESTINATION_SUBINVENTORY, SCPRL.QUANTITY_CANCELLED, SCPRL.CANCEL_DATE, SCPRL.CANCEL_REASON, SCPRL.CLOSED_CODE, SCPRL.AGENT_RETURN_NOTE, SCPRL.CHANGED_AFTER_RESEARCH_FLAG, COALESCE(SCPRL.VENDOR_ID, -999) AS VENDOR_ID_DD, COALESCE(SCPRL.VENDOR_SITE_ID, -999) AS VENDOR_SITE_ID_DD, SCPRL.VENDOR_CONTACT_ID, SCPRL.RESEARCH_AGENT_ID, SCPRL.ON_LINE_FLAG, SCPRL.WIP_ENTITY_ID, SCPRL.WIP_LINE_ID, SCPRL.WIP_REPETITIVE_SCHEDULE_ID, SCPRL.WIP_OPERATION_SEQ_NUM, SCPRL.WIP_RESOURCE_SEQ_NUM, SCPRL.ATTRIBUTE_CATEGORY, SCPRL.DESTINATION_CONTEXT, SCPRL.INVENTORY_SOURCE_CONTEXT, SCPRL.VENDOR_SOURCE_CONTEXT, SCPRL.ATTRIBUTE1, SCPRL.ATTRIBUTE2, SCPRL.ATTRIBUTE3, SCPRL.ATTRIBUTE4, SCPRL.ATTRIBUTE5, SCPRL.ATTRIBUTE6, SCPRL.ATTRIBUTE7, SCPRL.ATTRIBUTE8, SCPRL.ATTRIBUTE9, SCPRL.ATTRIBUTE10, SCPRL.ATTRIBUTE11, SCPRL.ATTRIBUTE12, SCPRL.ATTRIBUTE13, SCPRL.ATTRIBUTE14, SCPRL.ATTRIBUTE15, SCPRL.BOM_RESOURCE_ID, SCPRL.REQUEST_ID, SCPRL.PROGRAM_APPLICATION_ID, SCPRL.PROGRAM_ID, SCPRL.PROGRAM_UPDATE_DATE, SCPRL.USSGL_TRANSACTION_CODE, SCPRL.GOVERNMENT_CONTEXT, SCPRL.CLOSED_REASON, SCPRL.CLOSED_DATE, SCPRL.TRANSACTION_REASON_CODE, SCPRL.QUANTITY_RECEIVED, SCPRL.SOURCE_REQ_LINE_ID, SCPRL.ORG_ID, SCPRL.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE1, SCPRL.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE2, SCPRL.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE3, SCPRL.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE4, SCPRL.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE5, SCPRL.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE6, SCPRL.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE7, SCPRL.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE8, SCPRL.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE9, SCPRL.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE10, SCPRL.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE11, SCPRL.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE12, SCPRL.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE13, SCPRL.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE14, SCPRL.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE15, SCPRL.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE16, SCPRL.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE17, SCPRL.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE18, SCPRL.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE19, SCPRL.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE20, SCPRL.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE_CATEGORY, SCPRL.KANBAN_CARD_ID, SCPRL.CATALOG_TYPE, SCPRL.CATALOG_SOURCE, SCPRL.MANUFACTURER_ID, SCPRL.MANUFACTURER_NAME, SCPRL.MANUFACTURER_PART_NUMBER, SCPRL.REQUESTER_EMAIL, SCPRL.REQUESTER_FAX, SCPRL.REQUESTER_PHONE, SCPRL.UNSPSC_CODE, SCPRL.OTHER_CATEGORY_CODE, SCPRL.SUPPLIER_DUNS, SCPRL.TAX_STATUS_INDICATOR, SCPRL.PCARD_FLAG, SCPRL.NEW_SUPPLIER_FLAG, SCPRL.AUTO_RECEIVE_FLAG, SCPRL.TAX_USER_OVERRIDE_FLAG, SCPRL.TAX_CODE_ID, SCPRL.NOTE_TO_VENDOR, SCPRL.OKE_CONTRACT_VERSION_ID, SCPRL.OKE_CONTRACT_HEADER_ID, SCPRL.ITEM_SOURCE_ID, SCPRL.SUPPLIER_REF_NUMBER, SCPRL.SECONDARY_UNIT_OF_MEASURE, SCPRL.SECONDARY_QUANTITY, SCPRL.PREFERRED_GRADE, SCPRL.SECONDARY_QUANTITY_RECEIVED, SCPRL.SECONDARY_QUANTITY_CANCELLED, SCPRL.VMI_FLAG, SCPRL.AUCTION_HEADER_ID, SCPRL.AUCTION_DISPLAY_NUMBER, SCPRL.AUCTION_LINE_NUMBER, SCPRL.REQS_IN_POOL_FLAG, SCPRL.BID_NUMBER, SCPRL.BID_LINE_NUMBER, SCPRL.NONCAT_TEMPLATE_ID, SCPRL.SUGGESTED_VENDOR_CONTACT_FAX, SCPRL.SUGGESTED_VENDOR_CONTACT_EMAIL, SCPRL.AMOUNT, SCPRL.CURRENCY_AMOUNT, SCPRL.LABOR_REQ_LINE_ID, SCPRL.JOB_ID, SCPRL.JOB_LONG_DESCRIPTION, SCPRL.CONTRACTOR_STATUS, SCPRL.CONTACT_INFORMATION, SCPRL.SUGGESTED_SUPPLIER_FLAG, SCPRL.CANDIDATE_SCREENING_REQD_FLAG, SCPRL.CANDIDATE_FIRST_NAME, SCPRL.CANDIDATE_LAST_NAME, SCPRL.ASSIGNMENT_END_DATE, SCPRL.OVERTIME_ALLOWED_FLAG, SCPRL.CONTRACTOR_REQUISITION_FLAG, SCPRL.DROP_SHIP_FLAG, SCPRL.ASSIGNMENT_START_DATE, SCPRL.NEGOTIATED_BY_PREPARER_FLAG, SCPRL.SHIP_METHOD, SCPRL.ESTIMATED_PICKUP_DATE, SCPRL.SUPPLIER_NOTIFIED_FOR_CANCEL, SCPRL.BASE_UNIT_PRICE, SCPRL.AT_SOURCING_FLAG, SCPRL.TAX_ATTRIBUTE_UPDATE_CODE, SCPRL.TAX_NAME, SCPRL.TRANSFERRED_TO_OE_FLAG, SCPRL.CONFORMED_LINE_ID, SCPRL.AMENDMENT_TYPE, SCPRL.AMENDMENT_STATUS, SCPRL.LINE_NUM_DISPLAY, SCPRL.GROUP_LINE_ID, SCPRL.CLM_INFO_FLAG, SCPRL.CLM_OPTION_INDICATOR, SCPRL.CLM_BASE_LINE_NUM, SCPRL.CLM_OPTION_NUM, SCPRL.CLM_OPTION_FROM_DATE, SCPRL.CLM_OPTION_TO_DATE, SCPRL.CLM_FUNDED_FLAG, SCPRL.UDA_TEMPLATE_ID, SCPRL.CONTRACT_TYPE, SCPRL.COST_CONSTRAINT, SCPRL.AMENDMENT_RESPONSE_REASON, SCPRL.CLM_PERIOD_PERF_START_DATE, SCPRL.CLM_PERIOD_PERF_END_DATE, SCPRL.CLM_EXTENDED_ITEM_DESCRIPTION, SCPRL.CLM_OPTION_EXERCISED, SCPRL.GES_UPDATE_DATE, SCPRL.GLOBAL_NAME, SCPRL.BATCH_ID, SCPRL.CREATE_DATETIME, SCPRL.ACTION_CODE 
 
 FROM $$STGDB.ST_CG1_PO_REQUISITION_LINES SCPRL,
		     $$ETLVWDB.EL_PO_REQUISITION_HEADER EPRH
		WHERE SCPRL.REQUISITION_HEADER_ID = EPRH.REQUISITION_HEADER_ID
			AND SCPRL.GLOBAL_NAME=EPRH.GLOBAL_NAME
			)STELPRL

WHERE
(
 NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_PURCHASE_REQUISITION NPR,$$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC 
	              WHERE NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME = STELPRL.GLOBAL_NAME 
			    AND NPR.SK_PURCHASE_REQUISITION_ID_INT=STELPRL.REQUISITION_HEADER_ID
	    		    AND NPR.SS_CD=NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE)   
OR NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_ISO_CURRENCY_TV NIC	,
                             $$ETLVWDB.EV_ORG_SOB_CURRENCY EOSC
 			WHERE EOSC.ORG_ID=STELPRL.ORG_ID 
				  AND EOSC.GLOBAL_NAME=STELPRL.GLOBAL_NAME 
				  AND NIC.BK_ISO_CURRENCY_CODE=COALESCE(STELPRL.CURRENCY_CODE,EOSC.CURRENCY_CODE)  
			      AND END_TV_DATE='3500-01-01')  
OR NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$ETLVWDB.EV_ORG_SOB_CURRENCY EOSC
                WHERE EOSC.ORG_ID=STELPRL.ORG_ID 
				  AND EOSC.GLOBAL_NAME=STELPRL.GLOBAL_NAME)
OR NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_CURRENCY_CONV_DAILY_RATE NCCDR ,
                             $$ETLVWDB.EV_ORG_SOB_CURRENCY EOSC
 			WHERE EOSC.ORG_ID=STELPRL.ORG_ID 
				  AND EOSC.GLOBAL_NAME=STELPRL.GLOBAL_NAME 
				  AND NCCDR.BK_FROM_CURRENCY_CODE=COALESCE(STELPRL.CURRENCY_CODE,EOSC.CURRENCY_CODE) 
           		      AND NCCDR.BK_CONVERSION_DATE=STELPRL.CREATION_DATE_DD
            		      AND NCCDR.BK_TO_CURRENCY_CODE ='USD')   
OR NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$COMREFVWDB.N_ACCTS_PYBL_VNDR_PRTY NAPVP,$$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC 
	                WHERE NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME = STELPRL.GLOBAL_NAME 
	                     AND  NAPVP.SK_VENDOR_ID_INT = STELPRL.VENDOR_ID_DD
	    		     AND NAPVP.BK_SS_CD=NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE) 
OR NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$COMREFVWDB.N_ACCTS_PYBL_VNDR_SITE_PRTY NAPVSP,$$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC 
	                WHERE NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME = STELPRL.GLOBAL_NAME 
	                     AND NAPVSP.SK_VENDOR_SITE_ID_INT = STELPRL.VENDOR_SITE_ID_DD
	     		      AND NAPVSP.SS_CODE=NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE)   
)
